chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Crl. Bail Application No.3020 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). For hearing of bail application 1. For orders on M.A. No.15917/2025 (U/A). 2. For orders on office objection & reply of adv at glag A. 3. For orders on M.A. No.15918/2025 (Ex/A). 4. For hearing of bail application..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Dated 04.11.2025 Mr. Shoukat Ali Shehroz, Advocate for Applicant a/w Applicant..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. 1. Urgency granted. 2-3. Through this Criminal Bail Application, the applicant/accused Kamran Nadeem son of Ghulam Rasool seeks protective bail in FIR No.33/2016 under Section-409/419/420/468/471/109 PPC r/w 5 of PCA, 1947, registered at P.S FIA ACC, Karachi. Learned counsel for the applicant/accused inter alia contends that in the year 2017 the present applicant/accused was granted pre-arrest bail by this court, thereafter in the year 2019 his personal attendance was exempted by the trial court; that charge was framed in the year 2023 and he appeared before the trial court, thereafter at the time of amended charge, he again appeared before the trial court, however, in the year 2023 the applicant met with an accident, therefore, he could not appear and his condonation application was declined by the trial Court, thereafter in the month of August, 2025 the judgment was passed by the trial court and present applicant was declared absconder; that the proceedings under section-87 and 88 Cr.P.C were also initiated by the trial court, therefore, the applicant intends to surrender before the trial court for his bail but apprehends of his imminent arrest by the hands of police at the doorstep of the Court, hence this application for protective bail.

Through this Criminal Bail Application, the applicant/accused Kamran Nadeem son of Ghulam Rasool seeks protective bail in FIR No.33/2016 under Section-409/419/420/468/471/109 PPC r/w 5 of PCA, 1947, registered at P.S FIA ACC, Karachi. Learned counsel for the applicant/accused inter alia contends that in the year 2017 the present applicant/accused was granted pre-arrest bail by this court, thereafter in the year 2019 his personal attendance was exempted by the trial court; that charge was framed in the year 2023 and he appeared before the trial court, thereafter at the time of amended charge, he again appeared before the trial court, however, in the year 2023 the applicant met with an accident, therefore, he could not appear and his condonation application was declined by the trial Court, thereafter in the month of August, 2025 the judgment was passed by the trial court and present applicant was declared absconder; that the proceedings under section-87 and 88 Cr.P.C were also initiated by the trial court, therefore, the applicant intends to surrender before the trial court for his bail but apprehends of his imminent arrest by the hands of police at the doorstep of the Court, hence this application for protective bail. Without touching the merits of the case, the applicant is granted protective bail for a period of 07 days from today i.e 04.11.2025 to 10.11.2025 (both days inclusive), subject to furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.50,000/- (Rupees Fifty Thousand Only) and P.R bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of the Nazir of this Court. The applicant is directed to surrender before the trial Court. 2 This protective bail shall cease to have its effect after expiry of 07 days period i.e. 10.11.2025 or when the Applicant surrenders himself before the concerned Court, whichever be earlier. It is, however, made clear that in case, the applicant fails to make his appearance before the trial Court within a prescribed time, the surety submitted before this Court shall stand forfeited. Instant bail application stands disposed of. JUDGE Ayaz Gul
